title: Custom Map Banner Location
description: This mod lets you make maps with a custom banner location inside of them, without needing to go there and place a banner. Made to be able to manually input coordinates into the navigation table of Create: Aeronautics.
body:
This mod lets you make maps with a custom banner location inside of them, without needing to go there and place a banner.

Made to be able to manually input coordinates into the navigation table of Create: Aeronautics.

To create a map with a custom banner location, do the command /setbannerlocation <coordinates>

To do this, you must be holding a map and have at least one compass and one banner in your inventory.
